title: ortachne scabra
intro: Ortachne scabra is a type of grass, specifically a species of grass within the genus Ortachne, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ortachne scabra include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Ortachne scabra can be prepared as a herbal tea or used as a topical application in the form of a poultice or ointment.
